zh.lifeSummary: 當Hermann Ier de Luxembourg於大約1042年出生在海利格斯 洛米設斯 萊奇賀爾左圖姆 盧森堡時，他的父親Giselbert Graf von Luxemburg und Salm36歲，母親Ermentrude of Salm31歲。他和Sophia von Formbach至少有1個兒子。他去世於1088年9月28日在德國海藍-普法爾茲藍德可萊斯 可-爾可姆享年47歲，埋葬在法國莫瑟勒梅斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Hermann Ier de Luxembourg于大约1042年出生在海利格斯 洛米設斯 萊奇賀爾左圖姆 盧森堡时，他的父亲Giselbert Graf von Luxemburg und Salm36岁，母亲Ermentrude of Salm31岁。他和Sophia von Formbach至少有1个儿子。他去世于1088年9月28日在德国海藍-普法爾茲藍德可萊斯 可-爾可姆享年47岁，埋葬在法国莫瑟勒梅斯。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Hermann
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: Ier
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: and Norwegian vernacular form of   Peter .

variants.name: Peter
meanings: form of the name of the best-known of all Christ's apostles, traditionally regarded as the founder of the Christian Church. The name derives, via Latin, from Greek petros ‘stone, rock’. This is used as a translation of the Aramaic byname Cephas, given to the apostle Simon son of Jona, to distinguish him from another of the same name ( Simon Zelotes ). ‘When Jesus beheld him, he said, Thou art Simon the son of Jona: thou shalt be called Cephas, which is by interpretation, A stone’ (John 1:42). According to Matthew 16:17–18, Christ says more explicitly, ‘Blessed art thou, Simon Bar-jona … thou art Peter, and upon this rock I will build my church’. The name has been in continuous use since the Middle Ages.

en.lifeSummary: When Hermann Ier de Luxembourg was born about 1042, in Luxemburg, Holy Roman Empire, his father, Giselbert Graf von Luxemburg und Salm, was 36 and his mother, Ermentrude of Salm, was 31. He had at least 1 son with Sophia von Formbach. He died on 28 September 1088, in Cochem, Cochem-Zell, Rhineland-Palatinate, Germany, at the age of 47, and was buried in Metz, Moselle, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hermann Ier de Luxembourg est né environ 1042, à Luxembourg, Saint-Empire romain, son père, Giselbert Graf von Luxemburg und Salm, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Ermentrude of Salm, avait 31 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils avec Sophia von Formbach. Il est décédé le 28 septembre 1088, à Cochem, Landkreis Cochem-Zell, Rheinland-Pfalz, Allemagne, à l’âge de 47 ans, et a été enterré à Metz, Moselle, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Hermann Ier de Luxembourg um 1042 in Herzogtum Luxemburg, Heiliges Römisches Reich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Giselbert Graf von Luxemburg und Salm 36 und seine Mutter Ermentrude of Salm 31. Er hatte mit Sophia von Formbach mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb am 28. September 1088 im Alter von 47 Jahren in Cochem, Landkreis Cochem-Zell, Rheinland-Pfalz, Deutschland und wurde in Metz, Moselle, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Hermann Ier de Luxembourg è nato il circa 1042 nel Herzogtum Luxemburg, Heiliges Römisches Reich, il suo padre, Giselbert Graf von Luxemburg und Salm, aveva 36 anni e il suo madre, Ermentrude of Salm, aveva 31 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio con Sophia von Formbach. Morì il 28 settembre 1088, nel Cochem, Landkreis Cochem-Zell, Rheinland-Pfalz, Germania, all'età di 47 anni, e fu sepolto a Metz, Moselle, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Hermann Ier de Luxembourgが約1042年にヘイリジェズ ルoミシェス レイチハーゾグトゥム ルクセンブルグで生まれた時，父Giselbert Graf von Luxemburg und Salmは36歳，母Ermentrude of Salmは31歳であった。彼はSophia von Formbachとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼は1088年9月28日にドイツルヘインランド-プファルズランドクレイス コケム-ズエルコケムで47歳で死去し，フランスモセルメッツにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Hermann Ier de Luxembourg(이)가 대략 1042년 헤이리그스 o미슈스 라이치 허초그투 루세버그에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Giselbert Graf von Luxemburg und Salm(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Ermentrude of Salm(은)는 31세였다. 그는 Sophia von Formbach(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1088년 9월 28일 독일 리인랜드-p팔즈 랜드크레이스 코체-즈 코체에서 47세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 모셀 멧즈에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hermann Ier de Luxembourg nasceu aproximadamente 1042, em Herzogtum Luxemburg, Heiliges Römisches Reich, seu pai, Giselbert Graf von Luxemburg und Salm, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Ermentrude of Salm, tinha 31 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho com Sophia von Formbach. Ele faleceu em 28 de setembro de 1088, em Cochem, Landkreis Cochem-Zell, Rheinland-Pfalz, Alemanha, com 47 anos, e foi sepultado em Metz, Moselle, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hermann Ier de Luxembourg родился около 1042 г. в местности хирзогтум луксембург, хилигесь рoмищесь раич, его отцу по имени Giselbert Graf von Luxemburg und Salm было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Ermentrude of Salm, 31. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын от Sophia von Formbach. Он умер 28 сентября 1088 г. в местности кочем, ландкрис кочем-зелл, раинланд-пфалз, Германия в возрасте 47 лет и был похоронен в местности мец, моселл, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Hermann Ier de Luxembourg nació aproximadamente 1042, en Herzogtum Luxemburg, Heiliges Römisches Reich, su papá, Giselbert Graf von Luxemburg und Salm, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Ermentrude of Salm, tenía 31 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo con Sophia von Formbach. Murió el 28 de septiembre de 1088, en Cochem, Landkreis Cochem-Zell, Rheinland-Pfalz, Alemania, a la edad de 47 años, y fue sepultado en Metz, Moselle, Francia.
